_note: This file contained partial Leonoria weapon data (BT_001–BT_050) and has been superseded by the full Leonoria weapon system. See: weapons_melee_1h.json (W1H_001–052) and weapons_melee_2h.json (W2H_001–049). The new files include all former entries plus complete quality, material, damage distribution, stamina, and cost data.
